idea-plugin.name: Dynamia Tasks
idea-plugin.description:
Dynamia Tasks is your developer task manager, living inside your IDE. Stop context-switching between browser tabs, issue trackers, and sticky notes. Dynamia Tasks brings all your tasks into a single, distraction-free panel right where you work — inside IntelliJ IDEA.

What it does

  • Unified task list — merges GitHub Issues, local task files, and any custom source into one clean checklist per project.
  • Task Explorer — browse, search, and cherry-pick tasks from any connector without leaving the IDE.
  • Workspace checklist — pin only the tasks you're working on now. Your personal sprint, per project.
  • Open files from tasks — jump directly to the relevant file mentioned in a task description with one click.
  • Connector system — plug in GitHub Issues out of the box, use local JSON task files, or connect any third-party tool with a custom connector.
  • Labels and filtering — keep things organised with labels, status filters, and grouping.

GitHub Issues integration

Connect any public or private GitHub repository and manage its issues directly from IntelliJ IDEA. You can view, create, edit, comment, and close issues without ever opening a browser tab.

To enable it, generate a GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) with the repo scope (or public_repo for public repositories only) at github.com/settings/tokens, then paste it in Settings → Dynamia Tasks → GitHub Issues → Personal Access Token. The token is stored locally on your machine and never sent to any external server.

Privacy-first, always

No cloud. No telemetry. No accounts.
Everything runs locally on your machine. Your tasks, your tokens, your data — 100% offline capable.

Get started in seconds

  1. Open a project in IntelliJ IDEA.
  2. Click the Dynamia Tasks icon in the right tool window.
  3. Add local tasks instantly — no config needed.
  4. Optionally connect GitHub Issues: go to Settings, enter your Personal Access Token and repository (e.g. owner/repo).

Built for developers who like their tools minimal, fast, and out of the way.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.3

  • Improved IntelliJ startup flow to initialize Dynamia Tasks more reliably after project load.
  • Enhanced embedded server lifecycle handling and project-to-server registry stability.
  • General UX and performance refinements across the tool window integration.
